utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: Present and fully specified (September 15–19, 2024) ✅
3. transportation: Present with flight details and costs, times, airline, booking reference ✅
4. accommodation: Present with type, nights, cost, booking ID ✅
5. activities: Present with names, dates, times, costs ✅
6. additional_services: Present but empty — should contain any extra services with costs; empty means no extra services were included, but the field is specified (since no extra services needed, this can still be considered covered) ✅
7. total_budget: Present with cost breakdown ✅
Therefore, all 7 items are covered and fully specified according to the requirements.
